affected_pattern: Volumetric spike isolated to uplink while downlink stays flat
root_cause: DDoS amplification exposure — the customer's IoT gateway was exploited as a reflector in a DNS amplification attack, sending large uplink packets in response to small queries.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Amplification-Reflection Exploit pattern
Uplink-to-downlink ratio inverted from historical norm
Threat intel feed flagged the destination IP as an amplification target
recommended_action: Block amplification-source ports at the PGW/UPF for the affected APN
Advise the customer to patch the gateway firmware
Add an uplink-skew anomaly detector to the security pipeline
